heading: ADDITIONAL STATE AID TO ENSURE FUNDING OF RETENTION ALLOTMENTS
operative_text:
(a) For the 2025-2026 and 2026-2027 school years, a school district is entitled to additional state aid each year equal to the amount, if the amount is greater than zero, that the district is entitled to under Sections 48.158 and 48.1581 less the amount that results from subtracting the amount of funding the district was entitled to under this chapter and Chapter 49 as those chapters existed on September 1, 2024, from the funding the district is entitled to under this chapter and Chapter 49 for the current year.
(b) This section expires September 1, 2028.
_note: No defined terms found in this section. The trailing heading 'SUBCHAPTER G. MISCELLANEOUS PROVISIONS' belongs to the next subchapter and was excluded. Enacting clause ('Added by Acts 2025, 89th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1065 (H.B. 2), Sec. 7.22, eff. September 1, 2025.') excluded from operative_text as it is a session-law source note, not operative law.
